title: DEKTON 4-Piece Pick and Hook Set | Durable Chrome-Plated Carbon Steel | Soft Anti-Slip Grips | Ideal for Separating Wires and Removing Fuses | Versatile Tool for Various Applications
features: Durable Construction: Crafted from chrome-plated carbon steel, these picks and hooks are built to withstand heavy use and resist corrosion, ensuring long-lasting durability for various tasks.

Soft Anti-Slip Grips: The ergonomic handles feature soft anti-slip grips, providing maximum comfort and control during use. These handles reduce hand fatigue and improve precision, making the tools easier to maneuver.

Versatile Use: Ideal for separating wires, removing fuses, and handling a range of small parts. This set is perfect for both professional technicians and DIY enthusiasts needing reliable tools for intricate tasks.

Precision Tools: Each tool is designed for precision work, enabling you to access tight spaces and perform delicate operations with ease. The set includes different shapes to tackle various applications.

Convenient Storage: The set is organized for easy access and storage, ensuring that your tools are always ready for use. Keep your workspace tidy and your tools in top condition with this practical and efficient set.
description: Product Description The Dekton 4-Piece Pick and Hook Set is an essential toolkit for precision and versatility. Each tool is crafted from durable chrome-plated carbon steel, ensuring resistance to corrosion and long-lasting performance. The soft, anti-slip grips provide maximum comfort and control, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Ideal for separating wires, removing fuses, and other intricate tasks, this set is perfect for both professional technicians and DIY enthusiasts. The precision design of each tool allows for easy handling in tight spaces, making delicate operations effortless. Conveniently organized for easy access and storage, this set helps keep your workspace tidy and your tools in top condition. Whether you’re performing detailed repairs or handling small parts, the Dekton 4-Piece Pick and Hook Set delivers reliability and efficiency for a variety of applications. Box Contains 1 x 4 piece pick and hook set
